programme.title: White Lightning
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds stars as a moonshiner who wages war against corrupt police officials in this action extravaganza full of epic car chases, bone-crunching brawls and terrific acting by a stellar cast that includes Ned Beatty, Diane Ladd and Bo Hopkins.

programme.title: Gator
programme.desc: The Feds want Gator McKlusky (Burt Reynolds) to go undercover to expose local crime boss and former boyhood pal, Bama McCall. When Gator discovers Bama is involved in extortion, prostitution, and murder, the suspense builds to an explosive climax!

programme.title: Remo Williams: The Adventure Begins
programme.desc: Brace yourself for an hilarious, action-packed adventure! When an NYPD cop (Fred Ward) regains consciousness after a mugging, he has a new identity! He's Remo Williams, a recruit of a top-secret organization, and he's toppling evil at every turn!

programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: Fred Ward, Alec Baldwin and Jennifer Jason Leigh star in this deliciously offbeat black comedy about a murdering thief, his streetwalker-gone-straight wife and the denture-wearing cop who is closing in on his trail. Nora Dunn co-stars.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: Boot up for suspense and high-powered excitement with Jonny Lee Miller and Angelina Jolie when a group of hackers, the rebels of the information age, find themselves embroiled in a plot that could destroy the world's ecosystems…or their own lives.

programme.title: Anti-Trust
programme.desc: In this sizzling, fast-paced thriller, computer whiz Milo Hoffman (Ryan Phillippe) lands his dream job at a major computer company, only to learn that the C.E.O. (Tim Robbins) may employ some very unorthodox -- and very deadly --business practices.

programme.title: To Live And Die In L.A.
programme.desc: Federal agent Richard Chance has a score to settle, and he's through playing by the rules. He vows to take down a murderous counterfeiter by any means necessary.

programme.title: Thief
programme.desc: Michael Mann ("Manhunter") directs this stylish, action-packed drama that stars James Caan ("Misery") as a master safe cracker who is planning his last heist for the sake of a woman, Tuesday Weld ("Who'll Stop The Rain?"), and a new life.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Robert De Niro, Jean Reno and Stellan Skarsgard headline a stellar cast in director John Frankenheimer's action-packed and intelligent spy thriller about a group of for-hire mercenaries out to steal a top-secret briefcase for a mysterious client.

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: Fled tracks two prison escapees (Laurence Fishburne, Stephen Baldwin) on the lam as they race against time to find a hidden cache of cash and an incriminating computer disk that could either bring down the Cuban Mafia or get the two killed.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: In New York of the 1920s, the black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. Three rival gang leaders (Laurence Fishhburne, Tim Roth and Andy Garcia) battle for control of Harlem's urban power.

programme.title: Harley Davidson And The Marlboro Man
programme.desc: Mickey Rourke and Don Johnson star in this four-lane genre collision of biker movie, heist thriller, buddy flick and sci-fi pic that will take you to the hardline of action and adventure! Co-starring Tom Sizemore, Chelsea Field and Vanessa Williams.
